data.name: Jameela The Sexy Treasure Hunter
data.detailed_description:
Story

Jameela is a sexy brave treasure hunter. She makes a living by finding and selling hidden treasures.

Gameplay

Jameela The Sexy Treasure Hunter is a Single Player Adventure Third-Person Puzzle-Platformer game.

Features

Single Player Adventure

Third-Person Puzzle-Platformer game

Sexy female protagonist

Hot animated Adult cutscenes

Sexy Unlockable Outfits

Very High-Definition Adult Art

Multiple endings! (How many can you get?)

Beautiful environments

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WINDOWS® 10 (64-BIT Required)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-8400 / AMD Ryzen 5 2600
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® RTX 2060 or AMD Radeon™ RX 6800XT
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WINDOWS® 11 (64-BIT Required)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-9700 / AMD Ryzen 5 5500
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® RTX 4060
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 11 GB 可用空間
